name: Exfiltration Over Asymmetric Encrypted Protocol
description: Detects data exfiltration using TLS/SSL to unusual external destinations
query:
// Detect large TLS transfers to unusual destinations
// Trigger on high bytes_sent over HTTPS to uncommon domains
events from ndr_flow
where destination_port = 443
  and bytes_sent > 50000000
group by source_ip, destination_ip
having count(*) > 1
within 600 seconds
